titleStmt.title: SII 17.454: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 454. (A.R. No. 423 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Makara śu 1. Wednesday, Tiruvōṇam correspond to 1250 A.D., January 5, Wednesday.

This inscription records that the Sivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār, in Umbaḷa-nāḍu, agreed to maintain a perpetual lamp in the temple, with the income from the 1/4 vēli of land in Anapāyachaturvēdimaṅgalam after paying all the dues on the land granted by Paḷḷiyāḻvi, the elder sister of (akkai ?) Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ of Śāttaṅguḍi in Vaṇḍāḻai-vēḷūr-kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.
Śīvallava (Śrīvallabha-)ppēṟāṟu is mentioned as one of the boundaries of the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
nālāvatu makara nāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum putaṉkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Umpaḷa nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭu
ṭaiyār koyil muppatu vaṭṭattuk kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom
Irācentiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai veḷūrk kūṟṟattuc cāttaṅku
ṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kkaiThis may be restored as akkaipaḷḷi yāḻvi Inṟai nāḷāl vat
ta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Innāṭṭu teṉkāl Anapāyaccaruppeti
maṅkalattu koṇṭu viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai ci(la)vallavappe
rāṟṟukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tirunantāviḷakkup
puṟattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum va
ṭapāṟkellai tirunāmattukkāṇikku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉke
llaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa payir � va Innilam kālum paṟṟik kaṭamai Iṟut
tu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavar Erikkak ka
ṭavatāka sammatittom Ikkoyil muppatu vaṭṭattu civappirāmaṇarom
Digital edition of SII 17.454 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
